meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop searching for project ideas. Learn how to build passive income SaaS products using Antigravity and Claude Code in this advanced technical case study.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Passive income isn't found; it is engineered. By leveraging automated micro-SaaS patterns, you can deploy value-driven tools that solve specific, high-intent search queries. Use Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for rapid implementation to ship a profitable MVP in under 48 hours.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the ultimate founder killer. You have the technical stack, the ambition, and the hunger to ship, yet you are paralyzed by the 'no idea' trap. Most developers waste months chasing the next unicorn, while successful micro-SaaS founders are quietly building automated engines that convert search intent into recurring revenue.

This isn't about chasing trends; it's about building systematic value. By integrating the structural intelligence of Antigravity with the execution speed of Claude Code, you can transform a simple market inefficiency into a passive income machine. Let’s stop theorizing and start building.

steps.title: Identify High-Intent Market Gaps
steps.description: Don't guess what people want. Analyze long-tail search queries in niche communities to find 'pain-point' keywords that indicate a willingness to pay for automation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following niche data set and identify 5 high-intent, low-competition micro-SaaS opportunities that solve recurring manual workflows.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'search and summarize top 100 Reddit threads for [niche] keywords'

steps.title: Architect the Passive Engine
steps.description: Define the core data flow. Your goal is a low-maintenance architecture where AI handles the processing and the user manages the input.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a serverless architecture for a micro-SaaS that processes user input, leverages an LLM for transformation, and outputs a downloadable asset.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code --gen 'scaffold project using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe'

steps.title: Build the MVP Core
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the boilerplate and core logic. Focus on the 'Golden Path'—the fastest route from user signup to value delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust API endpoint that validates user payments via Stripe and triggers the core AI transformation logic.

steps.title: Automate Value Distribution
steps.description: Ensure your product delivers value without your intervention. Set up automated email sequences and user dashboards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated notification workflow using Resend that triggers upon successful completion of the user's AI-generated asset.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --package resend --task 'implement transactional email template'

steps.title: Optimize for Conversion
steps.description: Iterate on the landing page based on real user feedback. Use the data from your first 10 users to refine the value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this landing page copy and suggest 3 high-conversion A/B test variants focused on micro-SaaS passive income benefits.

pro_tips: Focus on 'utility-first' over 'feature-first'; users pay to solve a problem, not to use a complex UI.
Use Stripe Metered Billing to capture revenue from usage-based micro-SaaS models rather than fixed subscriptions.
Automate your SEO by generating landing pages for long-tail keywords using your core AI engine.
Prioritize cold-start performance; if your MVP takes longer than 2 seconds to load, you've already lost the lead.
Always build a 'kill switch' for your AI costs to prevent runaway API spend during unexpected traffic spikes.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to a staging environment, run a load test using your Claude Code suite, and launch to a single target community to validate demand.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark. Use this framework to move from 'no project ideas' to a recurring revenue stream in under a week. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
